debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
arr : Pop.RequestArray inst✝
req : Pop.Request inst✝
⊢ Pop.valConsistent✝ inst✝ (Pop.RequestArray._insert✝ inst✝ arr req) = true

failed_attempts:
simp_all [valConsistent, RequestArray._insert]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try trivial) <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try aesop)
  <;>
  simp_all [List.cons, List.nil, Option.some, Option.none]
  <;>
  aesop

since we are dealing with an abstract definition, we can directly assert the truth of the statement.
    exact by
      trivial
  -- Apply the general result to the specific case of `arr` and `req`.
  exact h₁ arr req

simp_all [valConsistent, opReqId?, RequestArray.val]
  <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try simp_all [RequestArray.val, valConsistent]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try linarith) <;>
  (try nlinarith)
  <;>
  (try nlinarith)
